title: Dance of the Dragons: The First Blood #got #shorts
description: The Dance of the Dragons began with tension—but it was the first bloodshed that made war inevitable. This is the moment everything changed. #ASOIAF #Targaryen #Shorts

scenes.narration: Wars don’t truly begin with armies—they begin with a single moment that cannot be undone.
scenes.image_prompt: dark sky with two dragons circling in tension, cinematic fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: As tensions rose, both sides prepared for conflict—but still hoped to avoid full war.
scenes.image_prompt: two opposing factions watching each other across distance, uneasy calm, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: A message was sent—one final attempt to demand loyalty and submission.
scenes.image_prompt: young rider flying on dragon carrying message through storm, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: But the skies were no longer safe—and another dragon was already waiting.
scenes.image_prompt: larger dragon emerging from clouds behind smaller one, ominous tension, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: What followed was not a battle—but a sudden, brutal clash in the sky.
scenes.image_prompt: two dragons colliding mid-air in violent struggle, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Fire met fire, and in moments, the first life of the war was lost.
scenes.image_prompt: falling dragon rider silhouetted against flames, tragic moment, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The death shocked both sides, turning fear into rage and hesitation into action.
scenes.image_prompt: reaction shots of both factions realizing what has happened, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: There would be no more messages, no more negotiations—only revenge.
scenes.image_prompt: armies preparing aggressively for war, tension rising, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: From that moment on, the war was no longer avoidable—it had already begun.
scenes.image_prompt: battlefield igniting as forces march forward, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because once the first blood is spilled, peace is no longer an option.
scenes.image_prompt: burning sky with dragon silhouettes and falling embers, cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
